title: Crispy Uruguayan Tofu Dumplings
description: A unique fusion dish that combines Uruguayan flavors with crispy tofu dumplings. This recipe is perfect for a snack or lunch.
instructions: 2. In a large mixing bowl, crumble the tofu into small pieces and set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the Uruguayan flour, salt, and black pepper.
4. Add the chopped oregano, garlic, onion, and scallion to the flour mixture and mix well.
5. Add the flour mixture to the tofu mixture and mix until well combined.
6. Lay a dumpling wrapper flat on a surface and place a small spoonful of the tofu mixture in the center.
7. Fold the wrapper in half and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
8. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
9. Heat a large non-stick skillet or frying pan with a small amount of olive oil over medium heat.
10. Add the dumplings to the skillet and fry until golden brown on both sides.
11. Transfer the dumplings to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
12. Serve the crispy Uruguayan tofu dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
